title: Futuristic Pack
description: Enhances the vanilla Minecraft experience by adding new textures and small details on items.
body:
Older versions of this pack can be found [here](https://www.mediafire.com/folder/27do8o6gighek/Futuristic)!

### [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) are recommended for the best experience!

This pack enhances the vanilla experience by changing the textures of most functional blocks (**Chests**, **Crafting Tables**, **Crafters**, **Dispensers**, **Blast Furnaces/Smokers**, **Target blocks**, etc.), and items aswell. It also makes some blocks (including ores) _emissive_.

It adds more variants for blocks such as the **Red Mushroom Block**, **Bookshelf**, etc.
And even animates items such as **Spider Eyes**, **Slime Balls**, **Totems** (they blink), **Trial/Ominous Keys** (they also blink), and more. It's also compatible with [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin).

Some features of this pack are inspired by [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net) (like the waxed copper textures and the infected block textures) and from _other packs_. Also the [Iron Rolem YEETing sound pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/iron-golem-yeeting) is pre-applied.

All splash texts are different and unique. Some strings have been changed to make the game *a bit* more consistent, but only for the English (US) language.
